page: Microsoft Azure EC2es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the ECEV6 server family. Powered by an Intel processor with x86_64 architecture, this instance features 2 dedicated virtual CPUs and 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. The underlying virtualization is managed by the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached volumes, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. There are no integrated graphics processing units, and the configuration does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation combined with a high memory density makes this instance suitable for workloads requiring a larger memory footprint relative to compute power without the overhead of local storage. Recommended workloads include small-scale databases, caching layers, and memory-intensive enterprise applications that utilize network-attached storage.
description: Microsoft Azure EC2es_v6 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the ECEV6 family, designed for workloads requiring a high memory-to-vCPU ratio. Built on the x86_64 architecture with an Intel processor, this instance provides 2 dedicated vCPUs and 16.0 GB of RAM, resulting in 8.0 GB of memory per core. Virtualization is delivered via Microsoft Hyper-V. The instance does not feature local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable, requiring external network-attached volumes for data persistence. It contains no GPUs and offers zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This configuration is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy applications with modest compute needs, such as small databases, in-memory caches, and enterprise applications that rely on network-attached storage.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel processors and a high memory-to-core ratio for memory-intensive workloads.

16.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage included
